zh.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carleton於大約1227年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾卡爾頓。她於大約1250年與Sir Richard le Boteler I在英國英格蘭藍卡爾特爾 勒 伍茲結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年之後在英國英格蘭藍卡爾卡爾頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾聖 米可艾爾也斯 奧 維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carleton于大约1227年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾卡爾頓。她于大约1250年与Sir Richard le Boteler I在英国英格兰藍卡爾特爾 勒 伍茲结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年之后在英国英格兰藍卡爾卡爾頓，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾聖 米可艾爾也斯 奧 維。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Carleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern and eastern England): variant of   Carlton  .
Irish (Ulster): adopted in Northern Ireland as an Anglicized form of Ó Cairealláin, see Carolan 2.

variants.name: Carlton
meanings: English (northern and eastern England): habitational name from any of various places called Carlton (Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Durham, Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, East Yorkshire, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire) or Carleton (Cumberland, Lancashire, Norfolk, Yorkshire). All come from Old Norse karl ‘common man, peasant’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Charlton ). Places spelled Carl(e)ton (as opposed to Charlton) are in areas of Scandinavian settlement, mostly in northern England.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carleton was born about 1227, in Carleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Richard le Boteler I about 1250, in Whittle le Woods, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1285, in Carleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in St Michael's on Wyre, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carleton est née environ 1227, à Carleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Richard le Boteler I environ 1250, à Whittle le Woods, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1285, à Carleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à St Michael's on Wyre, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Sir Richard le Boteler I circa 1250, nel Whittle le Woods, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carletonは約1227年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアカーレトンで生まれた。約1250年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウィットル ル ウッドスでSir Richard le Boteler Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年以後にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアカーレトンで死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスト ミチャエル'ス オン ウイアにて埋葬された。

ko.St Michael's on Wyre, Lancashire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스트 믹하얼'스  윈이르
ko.Whittle-Le-Woods, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 휘틀 일 우드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carleton(은)는 대략 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 칼턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 휘틀 일 우드즈에서 Sir Richard le Boteler I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 칼턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스트 믹하얼'스  윈이르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carleton nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard le Boteler I aproximadamente 1250, em Whittle le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1285, em Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em St Michael's on Wyre, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Whittle-Le-Woods, Lancashire, England: уиттл л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia de Carleton родилась около 1227 г. в местности карлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard le Boteler I около 1250 г. в местности уиттл л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1285 г. в местности карлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности ст мачаел'с он вир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
